title: 01.08 Test Server Skill Adjustment
text: 01.08 Test Server Skill Adjustment - GUIDEMYOJI Skip to content No results ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP Search CONTACT US Search Menu 01.08 Test Server Skill Adjustment Last Updated August 1, 2023 News & Updates shikigami adjustment spichimokuren Last Updated August 1, 2023 OVERVIEW News & Updates shikigami adjustment spichimokuren ❖ SP Azurestorm Ichimokuren RELATED POST Azurestorm Ichimokuren Skill Adjustments Azurestorm Ichimokuren 苍风一目连 技能调整 「风符 · 守」“Wind Amulet: Shield" Lvl 5 value changed to: For every 1% initial Crit overflow SP Ichimokuren has, Wind Shield grants 2% damage reduction (max 80% 40% , and his own Cdmg increase by 2%. 「风符 · 苍龙坠」“Wind Halted: Dragonfall" Lvl 4 – Upon release, recovers HP of ally who originally had a Wind Shield by 72% 35% of the remaining HP of shield on them. Lvl 5 – After release of skill, all Wind Shields reset to absorb damage equal to 217% of ATK if there are Wind Shields present thats now less than 72% of initial shield, reset the Wind Shield to 72% of initial. Copyright © Guidemyoji 2023 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!

TEST SERVER 06.02 Test Server Skill Adjustments Published on February 6, 2026 News & Updates shikigami adjustment tamamo RELATED POSTS Tamamonomae 玉藻前 Fox Fire 狐火 Lv 2 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 365% 362% . Lv 3 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 377% 371% . Lv 4 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 389% 380% . Lv 5 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 389% . If enemy is KO’d by Fox Fire or The Falling, immediately release the other skill without cost, DMG decreases successively by 20%. The Falling 堕天 Lv 2 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 180% 182% . Lv 3 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 185% 188% . Lv 4 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 190% 195% . Lv 5 skill effect has been changed to: DMG increases to 195%. If enemy is KO’d by Fox Fire or The Falling, immediately release the other skill without cost, DMG decreases successively by 20%. Notes These changes do not affect Tamamonomae as a monster. Copyright © Guidemyoji 2026 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!

title: 08.04 Test Server Skill Adjustments
text: 08.04 Test Server Skill Adjustments - GUIDEMYOJI Skip to content ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI ONMYOJI GUIDE ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI ONMYOJI GUIDE BUY US A COFFEE! 08.04 Test Server Skill Adjustments Last Updated 2025-04-08 News & Updates aoandon lord arakawa samurai x shikigami adjustment Last Updated 2025-04-08 OVERVIEW News & Updates aoandon lord arakawa samurai x shikigami adjustment RELATED POSTS 08/04 Test Server Update Aoandon 青行灯 技能调整 「明灯」“Lantern Support" Exclusive Effect. At the start of other ally shikigami’s turn, has a 10% chance to gain “Lantern Support” until the end of their turn. If “Lantern Support” is obtained when casting skills, every 1 orb left will increase the skill’s damage dealt by 5%. “Lantern Support”: Casting skills do not consume orbs. lv2 Trigger chance increases to 12%. lv3 Trigger chance increases to 14%. lv4 Trigger chance increases to 16%. lv5 Trigger chance increases to 40%, but chance is reduced by 3% for every 1 orb owned. REMOVED: During each turn, if your orbs overflow, they gain a Candlelight stack. While they have 3 Candlelight stacks, when the next ally takes an action, increases their chance of granting a Lantern Support to 100%, so they lose all their Candlelight stacks. This can be triggered only up to once a turn. 「吸魂灯」“Lantern Drain" Deals damage equals to 158% of her ATK to all enemies, and has a 30% chance of draining 1 orb from each attacked enemy. After she attacks, for every 1 additional orb the ally side has in comparison to the opponent side, she deals an additional 1 time follow-up damage to a random target equals to 120% of her ATK (does not apply to monsters). lv2 Damage increases to 165%. lv3 Damage increases to 172%. lv4 Damage increases to 180%. lv5 Damage increases to 190%. Grants the allied shikigami with the highest ATK a “Lantern Support”. NOTE When appearing as monster, her skills will not be affected by these adjustments. Lord Arakawa 荒川之主 技能调整 「逐流」“Empowering Flow" Exclusive Effect. Deals 20% additional damage when he launches a critical hit; Gains “Empowering Flow” at start of battle. “Empowering Flow” : Reduces DEF by 20%; When he deals damage, ignores 120 enemy DEF. For every time his damage received cumulatively equals to 50% of max HP, casts a costless “Swallow” on an enemy target. lv2 “Empowering Flow” Trigger condition is reduced to 40% of Max HP. lv3 “Empowering Flow” Trigger condition is reduced to 30% of Max HP. lv4 Gains dditional 20% life steal effect when he deals a critical hit. lv5 When receiving movebar pushing effect, converts that to 30% movebar increase instead (up to 2 times before the start of his turn). 「吞噬」“Swallow" Attacks enemy target twice, first hit dealing damage equal to 53% of his ATK and has a 100% base chance to inflict “Isolation” lasting for 2 turns; the second hit deals damage equals 211% of his ATK. He enters a 【君临】state after using skill, lasting for 2 turns. “Isolation” : Only 1 enemy target can be isolated. The isolated target cannot be selected by any of their other allies. Damage taken cannot be shared or redirected by other effects. 【君临】 : When he casts “Swallow”, additionally deals a follow-up 2-strike attack on 2 enemies with lowest HP, each attack dealing damage equals to 100% of his ATK. Samurai X 兵俑 技能调整 「挥斩」“Sword Slices" Attacks an enemy target, dealing damage equals to 300% DEF. When skill released out of turn, damage is increased by 200%. lv2 Damage is increased to 340%. lv3 Damage is increased to 380%. lv4 Damage is increased to 420%. lv5 When releaseing skill within turn, has 30% base chance of inflicting Taunt on the enemy target. 「坚甲」“Sturdy Armor" Exclusive effect. For every 20% proportional HP loss , increases his DEF by 8% . If he is unable to take action, enters「石化」and gains 100 SPD, lasting for 2 turns. 「石化」: Increase 100% DEF, immune to movebar changing effects. lv2 DEF gain increases to 12% . lv3 When receiving normal attack from the enemy for the first time in each turn, counter attacks the damage source. lv4 DEF increasing effect shared to all allies. lv5 When allies receive normal attack from the enemy, Samurai X Bears 65% of the damage (does not trigger his own soul effects). 「坚不可破 」“Unbreakable" Normal attack damage received is decreased by 30%. [Release] Enters「石化」state, and has a 50% base chance of inflicting Taunt on all enemies, lasting for 1 turn. lv2 DEF increasing effect in state is increased to 110%. lv3 DEF increasing effect in state is increased to 120%. lv4 DEF increasing effect in state is increased to 130%. lv5 DEF increasing effect in state is increased to 150%. NOTE Base DEF is increased from 415 to 481 . When appearing as monster, his skills will not be affected by these adjustments. Copyright © Guidemyoji 2025 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!

title: 10.5 Test Server Skill Adjustment
text: 10.5 Test Server Skill Adjustment - GUIDEMYOJI Skip to content ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP PLAY NOW Menu 10.5 Test Server Skill Adjustment Last Updated May 9, 2023 News & Updates shikigami adjustment spmenreiki Last Updated May 9, 2023 OVERVIEW News & Updates shikigami adjustment spmenreiki ❖ SP Void Menreiki RELATED POST 10.5 Void Menreiki Skill Adjustments Void Menreiki 空相面灵气 技能调整 「梦虚空境」“Void Dreamland" Lv 5 new effect has been added; “When Watchful Eye is inflicted on the same target, causing their passive skills to fail until the end of Void Menreiki’s next turn, the mark cannot be dispelled. “ The Mark「一線目」”Watchful Eye” will now last for 3 rounds . Skill AI is now adjusted to target the enemy with the highest HP . Copyright © Guidemyoji 2023 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!

title: 11.07 Test Server Skill Adjustments
text: 11.07 Test Server Skill Adjustments - GUIDEMYOJI Skip to content No results ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP Search CONTACT US Search Menu 11.07 Test Server Skill Adjustments Last Updated July 11, 2023 News & Updates shikigami adjustment spichimokuren Last Updated July 11, 2023 OVERVIEW News & Updates shikigami adjustment spichimokuren ❖ SP Shura Kidomaru ❖ SP Azurestorm Ichimokuren ❖ SP Shishio RELATED POST Azurestorm Ichimokuren Skill Adjustments Azurestorm Ichimokuren 苍风一目连 技能调整 「风符 · 守」“Wind Amulet: Shield" Effect Exclusive Lv 2 effect has been adjusted to: Increase damage absorbed by Wind Shield to 217%. For each ally with Wind Shield present, SP Ichimokuren receive 5% damage reduction, max 30%. Lv 3 effect has been adjusted to: HP required to trigger Wind Shield has been increased to 40%. Skill cool-down reduced to 2 rounds. Lv 4 effect has been adjusted to: When ally receives a Shield, SP Ichimokuren himself will receive a Wind Shield that absorbs 50% of what ally’s shield absorbs. Lv 5 effect has been adjusted to: For every 1% initial Crit overflow SP Ichimokuren has, Wind Shield grants 1% damage reduction, and his own Cdmg increase by 2%. Copyright © Guidemyoji 2023 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!

title: 13.05 Test Server Skill Adjustments
text: 13.05 Test Server Skill Adjustments - GUIDEMYOJI Skip to content ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI ONMYOJI GUIDE ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI ONMYOJI GUIDE BUY US A COFFEE! 13.05 Test Server Skill Adjustments Last Updated 2025-05-13 News & Updates hiromasa ootengu shikigami adjustment ubume Last Updated 2025-05-13 OVERVIEW News & Updates hiromasa ootengu shikigami adjustment ubume RELATED POSTS 13.05 Test Server Update Hiromasa 源博雅 技能调整 「多重箭」“Double Release" Skill cooldown has been changed to 0 . 「秘术 · 豹眼」“Occult: Panther Eyes" Skill cooldown has been changed to 0 . Lv 5 skill effect has been changed: Increase all allies’ movebar by 15% . 「诛邪箭」“Rapid Release" The skill is now a passive skill . Skill effect has been changed to: Gains 3 layers of “Rapid Release” at the start of the battle and at the end of his turn. When allies other than himself use Normal Attack within turn, he consumes 1 layer of “Rapid Release” to assist in battle, and increases his own movebar by 15%. “Rapid Release “: Max 3 layers. Releases 3 arrows to attack enemies. Each arrow deals damage equal to 80% of his ATK. The damage dealt by each arrow increases by 10%. Lv 2 Each arrow’s damage is increased to 85%. Lv 3 Each arrow’s damage is increased to 90%. Lv 4 Each arrow’s damage is increased to 95%. Lv 5 Each arrow’s damage is increased to 100%. 「秘术 · 影分身」“Occult: Shadow Double" The shadow double no longer occupies the summon spot. Creates a shadow double that cannot be attacked. Each time an ally takes an action, the shadow double will attack an enemy with a Celestial Arrow, prioritising the target selected by the ally, dealing damage equals to 90% of his ATK. Lv 2 Upon release, increases his own crit by 30% . Lv 3 Damage dealt is increased to 100% . Lv 4 Upon release, increases his own SPD by 30 . Lv 5 Upon release, increases his movebar by 70% . STAT CHANGES Hiromasa’s base crit has been adjusted to 20% . Ootengu 大天狗 技能调整 「钢铁之羽」“Wings of Steel" Lv 5 effect is changed to: When Shelter negates a controlling effect, casts “Blade Storm” without cost. 「羽刃风暴」“Blade Storm" Commands a storm to rain blades onto all enemies to inflict 4 continuous strikes, dealing damage equals to 65% of his ATK on each strike. Every time a hit lands on an enemy target, increases his “Heroic Posture” by 1 layer and increases his movebar by 5%, at max 6 triggers per skill cast. Lv 2 Damage is increased to 67% . Lv 3 Damage is increased to 69% . Lv 4 Damage is increased to 71% . Lv 5 Damage is increased to 75% . Ubume 姑获鸟 技能调整 「协战」“Co-op" Additional effect has been added: If Ubume is deployed and clears the battle, experience gained is increased by 9% . STAT CHANGES Ubume’s base crit has been adjusted to 50% . Ubume’s base crit damage has been adjusted to 120% . Copyright © Guidemyoji 2025 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!

title: 14.05 Test Server Skill Adjustment
text: 14.05 Test Server Skill Adjustment - GUIDEMYOJI Skip to content No results ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP ABOUT NEWS SHIKIGAMI GUIDE EVENT SHOP Search CONTACT US Search Menu 14.05 Test Server Skill Adjustment Last Updated May 14, 2024 News & Updates kujaku myou-ou shikigami adjustment spibarakidoji spmiketsu spootengu Last Updated May 14, 2024 OVERVIEW News & Updates kujaku myou-ou shikigami adjustment spibarakidoji spmiketsu spootengu ❖ SP Inferno Ibaraki Doji ❖ SP Divine Miketsu ❖ SP Jr. Ootengu ❖ SSR Kujaku-Myoo RELATED POST Kujaku Myou-ou Skill Description Inferno Ibaraki Doji Skill Adjustments Inferno Ibaraki Doji 炼狱茨木童子 技能调整 「炼狱之门」“Inferno Gate" Orb Cost reduce to 3. Divine Miketsu Skill Adjustments Divine Miketsu 稻荷神御馔津 技能调整 「狐鈴」“Fox Bell" Ringing her blessing bell sends out one of her foxes to attack 1 enemy, dealing DMG equal to 80% of her ATK, and has a 50% Base Chance of inflicting on of the effects among Silence, Seal, Suppress, and 缚足(Binded Feet) , lasts 1 turn. 缚足 (Binded Feet): Cannot be affected by movebar changing effects. 「狐狩 · 日曜界」“Sunlit Fox Realm" Lvl 4 – Increase dispelling chance to 100%. Jr. Ootengu Skill Adjustments Jr. Ootengu 少羽大天狗 技能调整 「羽刃之风」“Feather Blade Wind" Lvl 4 – Increase DMG to 50% . Lvl 5 – Effect Exclusive: For each non-summon entity enemy died, initial attacks increase by 2 hits, max 4 additional hits. Kujaku-Myoo Skill Adjustments Kujaku-Myoo 孔雀明王 技能调整 「缴械」“Disarm" Prevents the unit from using Normal Attack, and souls wore by the unit loses effects. When this is dispelled, reduces the unit’s Normal Attack DMG by 20%, lasts 1 round. Copyright © Guidemyoji 2024 Mouba is slapping orbs to load the site!
